Go to the documentation of this file.

00005 #pragma once
00006 #include "sprite/common.hpp"
00007 #include "sprite/payloads.hpp"
00008 #include "sprite/pointer.hpp"
00009 #include <boost/utility.hpp>
00010 #include <boost/range/iterator_range.hpp>
00011 
00017 #define SPRITE_INPLACE_BOUND 3
00018 
00024 #define SPRITE_REWRITE_ARG_BOUND 4
00025 
00026 namespace sprite
00027 {
00028   // =============
00029   // Forward defs.
00030   // =============
00031   template<TagValue> struct rewrite;
00032   template<typename Payload> struct Node_;
00033   namespace visitors { struct Clone; }
00034 
00074   struct Node
00075   {
00076     // ====== Data accessors. ======
00077 
00079     uint32 refcount() const { return this->m_refcount; }
00080 
00082     TagValue tag() const { return this->m_tag; }
00083 
00085     uint32 id() const { return this->m_id; }
00086 
00088     uint32 arity() const { return this->m_arity; }
00089 
00090     // ====== Abstract Object Management. ======
00091 
00097     NodePtr clone();
00098 
00100     #define F(z,n,_)                                                         \
00101         template<TagValue Value BOOST_PP_ENUM_TRAILING_PARAMS(n,typename T)> \
00102         static NodePtr create(BOOST_PP_ENUM_BINARY_PARAMS(n,T,const & t));   \
00103         
00104     BOOST_PP_REPEAT(SPRITE_REWRITE_ARG_BOUND,F,)
00105     #undef F
00106 
00108     void * _payload() { return this + 1; }
00109     void const * _payload() const { return this + 1; }
00110 
00111   private:
00112 
00113     // ====== Object management. ======
00114 
00115     // Everything in this section is private.  Use the abstract interface (above)
00116     // to manage nodes.
00117 
00118     friend struct visitors::Clone; // Needs constructors.
00119     template<typename> friend struct Node_; // Needs ~Node.
00120     template<TagValue> friend struct rewrite; // Needs destroy_payload.
00121 
00123     Node() : m_refcount(0) {}
00124 
00126     Node(Node const & x)
00127       : m_refcount(0), m_tag(x.m_tag), m_id(x.m_id), m_arity(x.m_arity)
00128     {}
00129 
00131     Node & operator=(Node const & x)
00132     {
00133       this->m_tag = x.m_tag;
00134       this->m_id = x.m_id;
00135       this->m_arity = x.m_arity;
00136       return *this;
00137     }
00138 
00140     void destroy_payload();
00141 
00143     ~Node() { this->destroy_payload(); }
00144 
00146     void * operator new(size_t bytes);
00147 
00149     void operator delete(void *);
00150 
00151   public:
00152 
00153     // ====== Child access. ======
00154 
00156     typedef boost::iterator_range<NodePtr *> range_type;
00157 
00159     typedef boost::iterator_range<NodePtr const *> const_range_type;
00160 
00162     range_type iter();
00163 
00165     const_range_type iter() const;
00166 
00168     NodePtr & operator[](size_t i);
00169 
00171     NodePtr const & operator[](size_t i) const;
00172 
00178     size_t position(NodePtr const & child) const;
00179 
00180   private:
00181 
00182     // ====== Smart pointer support. ======
00183 
00185     friend void intrusive_ptr_add_ref(Node * node)
00186       { ++node->m_refcount; }
00187 
00189     friend void intrusive_ptr_release(Node * node)
00190       { if(--node->m_refcount == 0) { delete node; } }
00191 
00192   private:
00193 
00194     // ====== Data members. ======
00195 
00196     uint32 m_refcount;
00197     TagValue m_tag : 32;
00198     uint32 m_id;
00199     uint32 m_arity;
00200 
00201   };
00202 
00206   template<typename Payload> struct Node_ : Node
00207   {
00208     typedef Payload payload_type;
00209     Payload payload;
00210   };
00211 
00218   size_t const NODE_BYTES = 32;
00219 
00220   // Aliases for the complete node types.
00221 
00223   typedef Node_<payloads::Unused<> > AbstractNode;
00224   BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(AbstractNode) == NODE_BYTES);
00225 
00227   typedef Node_<payloads::InPlace<0> > InPlaceNode0;
00228   BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(InPlaceNode0) == NODE_BYTES);
00229 
00231   typedef Node_<payloads::InPlace<1> > InPlaceNode1;
00232   BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(InPlaceNode1) == NODE_BYTES);
00233 
00235   typedef Node_<payloads::InPlace<2> > InPlaceNode2;
00236   BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(InPlaceNode2) == NODE_BYTES);
00237 
00239   typedef Node_<payloads::ChildList> ChildListNode;
00240   BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(ChildListNode) == NODE_BYTES);
00241 
00243   typedef Node_<payloads::Choice> ChoiceNode;
00244   BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(ChoiceNode) == NODE_BYTES);
00245 
00252   typedef Node_<payloads::Fwd> FwdNode;
00253   BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(FwdNode) == NODE_BYTES);
00254 
00256   typedef Node_<payloads::Int> IntNode;
00257   BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(IntNode) == NODE_BYTES);
00258 
00260   typedef Node_<payloads::Float> FloatNode;
00261   BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(FloatNode) == NODE_BYTES);
00262 
00263  
00265   inline bool skip_fwd_ref(NodePtr & ptr, Node & ref)
00266   {
00267     if(ref.tag() == FWD)
00268     {
00269       ptr = static_cast<FwdNode &>(ref).payload.dest;
00270       return true;
00271     }
00272     return false;
00273   }
00274 
00275 
00276   namespace meta
00277   {
00288     template<sprite::TagValue,size_t Arity=-1> struct NodeOf;
00289     template<> struct NodeOf<FAIL,-1> : mpl::identity<AbstractNode> {};
00290     template<> struct NodeOf<CTOR,-1> : mpl::identity<ChildListNode> {};
00291     template<> struct NodeOf<CTOR,0> : mpl::identity<InPlaceNode0> {};
00292     template<> struct NodeOf<CTOR,1> : mpl::identity<InPlaceNode1> {};
00293     template<> struct NodeOf<CTOR,2> : mpl::identity<InPlaceNode2> {};
00294     template<size_t N> struct NodeOf<CTOR,N> : NodeOf<CTOR,-1> {};
00295     template<> struct NodeOf<OPER,-1> : mpl::identity<ChildListNode> {};
00296     template<> struct NodeOf<OPER,0> : mpl::identity<InPlaceNode0> {};
00297     template<> struct NodeOf<OPER,1> : mpl::identity<InPlaceNode1> {};
00298     template<> struct NodeOf<OPER,2> : mpl::identity<InPlaceNode2> {};
00299     template<size_t N> struct NodeOf<OPER,N> : NodeOf<OPER,-1> {};
00300     template<> struct NodeOf<CHOICE,-1> : mpl::identity<ChoiceNode> {};
00301     template<> struct NodeOf<FWD,-1> : mpl::identity<FwdNode> {};
00302     template<> struct NodeOf<INT,-1> : mpl::identity<IntNode> {};
00303     template<> struct NodeOf<FLOAT,-1> : mpl::identity<FloatNode> {};
00304   }
00305 }
00306 
00307 #include "sprite/detail/node_impl.hpp"
